## 2026-03-04

### Impact

- Fixed a bug where users saw a "Webpage not available" error when navigating back from a connector login page, reported across multiple connectors including ADP, Paylocity, and others
- Resolved an issue causing app freezes (ANR) and memory warnings when users rotated their device during a Transact session
- The legacy SDK variant (`-kotlin1.9`) now works with AGP 8.1, expanding compatibility for apps that have not yet upgraded to Kotlin 2.0+

### Changes

- Fixed "Webpage not available" error when navigating back from connector login pages
- Fixed device rotation causing memory overload and ANR in Transact sessions
- Legacy SDK variant is now compatible with AGP 8.1 for Kotlin 1.9.x projects
- Transact background service no longer restarts unexpectedly after being stopped

### Products

- Deposit
- Switch
- Manage

### Requirements

#### Latest

| Name       | Compatible | Build Version |
| ---------- | ---------- | ------------- |
| Kotlin     | 2.0+       | 2.1.21        |
| Gradle     | 8.7+       | 8.7           |
| AGP        | 8.6+       | 8.6.1         |
| Min SDK    | 21         | 21            |
| Target SDK | 35         | 35            |

#### Legacy (`-kotlin1.9`)

| Name       | Compatible | Build Version |
| ---------- | ---------- | ------------- |
| Kotlin     | 1.9.x      | 1.9.25        |
| Gradle     | 8.0+       | 8.7           |
| AGP        | 8.1 - 8.5  | 8.1.4         |
| Min SDK    | 21         | 21            |
| Target SDK | 35         | 35            |

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/atomicfi/atomic-transact-android/compare/v3.16.0...v3.16.1
